programs.title: Shocking dishes
programs.desc: Jarek Nowak goes to Singapore, a city that provides tourists with many delights and surprises.He will look for the strangest dishes and the most interesting delicacies of Asian cuisine.The tasting will start with bird's nest soup, the main ingredient of which is dried swallow saliva, which has extremely health-promoting properties.The locals consider it a real delicacy, and you have to pay dearly for a portion of the soup.Then Jarek will try sheep brain and shark head, before snacking on durian dessert, the smelliest fruit in the world.

programs.title: Indonesia's Best Ever Eats
programs.desc: A culinary journey to the largest island country in the world.Gourmets will discover the best dishes from five regions of Indonesia, including the area around Lake Toba in Sumatra.

programs.title: China according to Jarek Nowak
programs.desc: Jarek Nowak, anthropologist and traveler, goes on an expedition through China to rediscover one of the oldest civilizations in the world.The host will take viewers on a walk through the alleys of the Great Wall of China, tasting street food dishes and trekking through the Leaping Dragon Gorge.There will also be interesting attractions, surprising customs and unusual dishes.The traveler will advise you on how to get around, what to do in your free time and how to experience a once-in-a-lifetime adventure.The program is an alternative guide that contains a lot of interesting facts and practical tips for everyone.

programs.title: Moonshiners 11
programs.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programs.title: Moonshiners 11
programs.desc: Further adventures of producers of illegal alcohol.The demand for their products is growing, which is why this business is becoming more and more dangerous.To expand production, new helpers are needed.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc: Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity.
